key_finding: CONFOUND CONFIRMED: V_prompt AUC (0.63-0.73) >= V_chain_bin0 (0.60-0.66) at ALL 4 layers. Exp 104 bin-0 signal was problem encoding, not computation quality. Late-chain (bin 19) V exceeds prompt at 2/4 layers (+0.03-0.10) — modest late computation signal. K_prompt=0.758 at L27 (highest AUC). Concatenation: chain unique info +0.04-0.07 at bins 10-19, zero at bins 0-5.
evidence_impact: REINTERPRETS exp 104: early correctness = problem meta-cognition (prompt features), late correctness = computation quality (chain features). V|nums functional conditioning (exp 101/102) UNAFFECTED. Honest negative that strengthens remaining evidence.
next_planned: Cross-model prompt-vs-chain replication on Phi, or probe intermediate computation values
